true_header: This agreement is entered into by and between:
Now, therefore, the parties agree as follows:
Each party, to the extent of its right to do so,
The receiving party hereby covenants that,

Be protected and kept in strict confidence by the receiving party which must use the same degree of precaution and safegu ards as it uses to protect its own proprietary information of like importance,
Be only disclosed to and used by those persons who have a need to know and solely for the purpose specified in this agreement,

Not be used in whole or in part for any purpose other than the purpose of this agreement as specified in the preamble and for the project above without the prior written consent of the disclosing party,

Neither be disclosed nor caused to be disclosed whether directly or indirectly to any third party or persons other than t hose mentioned in subparagraph b) or the buyer clients or its co -contractors for the project,
Has come into the public domain prior to,
Is already known to the receiving party,
Has been lawfully received from a third party without restrictions or breach of this agreement,
Has been or is published without violation of this agreement, or
Is independently developed in good faith by an employee or employees of that receiving party who did not have access to t he proprietary information,
Is approved for release or use by written authorization of the disclosing party.
Except as provided under clause 12.2 of the general purchase conditions,
This contract shall be governed by buyer country laws and its appropriate courts of paris.
“ recipient ” means the party receiving confidential information.
“ discloser ” means the party disclosing confidential information to the other party.
Any discussions and negotiations between or within the parties with respect to or in connection with the establishment of a business relationship between the parties;
Any activities in connection with the business relationship between the parties.
Confidential information shall not include information that recipient can demonstrate:
Is at the time of disclosure, or subsequently becomes,
To have had rightfully in its possession prior to disclosure to recipient by discloser;
Is independently developed by recipient without the use of any confidential information; or
Recipient rightfully obtains from a third party who has the right to transfer or disclose it;
Was disclosed to a third party with the discloser's prior written consent; or
Was disclosed to a third party after the period of seven (7)  years from the date of the disclosure.
Non-disclosure and non-use of confidential information
Recipient may disclose confidential information to its subsidiaries without discloser’s consent,
Disclosure to or by a party’s respective subsidiaries shall be considered as disclosure to or by the respective party;
Each party is responsible and liable for its respective subsidiaries’ compliance and due delivery of the obligations set out in this agreement.
For the purposes of this agreement,
In addition and regardless of negligence or fault or proof of an actual damage,
Recipient (i) shall not disclose confidential information,
This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with austrian law,
"affiliate" means with respect to any person,
Agreement means this non-disclosure agreement including all appendices (if any).
Client  means any customers or business partners of the party;
Effective date means the date when the last of the parties signed the agreement.
Project has the meaning ascribed to it in clause 4.1.
Use confidential information only for the project;
Was, at the time of its disclosure,
Breach by recipient of its obligations contained in this agreement (or by any person to whom disclosure of information is made as permitted under this agreement);
Breach by a third party of any other obligation or duty of confidentiality or non- disclosure relating to that information that recipient is or ought to be aware of;
Is required to be disclosed by law,
Inform discloser of the circumstances of the disclosure and the information that will be disclosed as soon as reasonably practicable;
Permit discloser in its absolute discretion to seek to obtain an injunction or take other appropriate action to protect the confidential information;
Take all such steps as may be reasonable and practicable in the circumstances to agree the form,
Consult with discloser as to possible steps to prevent or limit such disclosure and take those steps to the extent reasonably practicable in the circumstances,
Request assurances as to confidentiality from anybody to which the confidential information is to be disclosed.
With respect to the confidential information disclosed,
If recipient discloses or distributes confidential information to any of its representatives,
Upon discloser s request, recipient shall promptly,

V:  use and protection of classified information
Recipient shall keep all  classified  information  in a secure place.
In the event that the recipient is required to disclose classified information by subpoena,
In the event that velco, in its sole discretion, so requests,
